allow: Bash(cmd /c "gh pr create --title ""feat: replace 33 sprawling skills with 7-agent sprint stack \(v0.18.0.0\)"" --body ""See PR description"" --base main")
Bash(powershell -Command "gh pr create --title ''feat: replace 33 sprawling skills with 7-agent sprint stack \(v0.18.0.0\)'' --base main")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; if \(-not \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\) { Write-Output ''not found'' }")

Bash(powershell -Command "ls ''C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; ls ''C:\\Users\\AvenPuter\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object Name -like ''*github*'' -or $_Name -like ''*gh*''")

Bash(powershell -Command "if \($env:GITHUB_TOKEN\) { Write-Output ''token found'' } else { Write-Output ''no token'' }; if \($env:GH_TOKEN\) { Write-Output ''gh token found'' } else { Write-Output ''no gh token'' }")
